query:
-- Get a broad sample of distinct descriptions to understand all patterns
SELECT 
  description,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(amount) as min_amount,
  MAX(amount) as max_amount
FROM billing_items
WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND description != ''
GROUP BY description
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 80;
